sourcesContent:
Intelligent Health Monitoring. Simplified.

Health Adviser is a secure digital health management platform that helps individuals track vital signs, manage prescriptions, receive AI-powered wellness plans, and stay consistent with medication routines — all in one structured dashboard.

✓ Secure Authentication   ✓ AI-Enhanced Insights   ✓ Privacy Focused

Built for Proactive Health Management

Designed to empower individuals with structured tracking, intelligent analysis, and actionable health insights.

📊 Vital Tracking

Log blood pressure, pulse, and other health metrics with weekly historical analysis.

📁 Prescription Management

Securely store and organize prescriptions with OCR-based text extraction.

⏰ Smart Reminders

Automated medication reminders to improve adherence and consistency.

🤖 AI Wellness Plans

Personalized diet and workout plans generated using BMI and health history.

How It Works

1

Create Profile

Register securely and enter essential health information.

2

Track & Upload

Upload prescriptions and log blood pressure readings.

3

Receive Insights

Get AI-powered recommendations and structured reminders.

Advanced Blood Pressure Monitoring

Monitor systolic and diastolic trends with intelligent classification (Normal, Stage 1, Stage 2, Crisis). Weekly comparisons help detect patterns early.

  • Historical tracking
  • Color-coded health stages
  • Pulse integration
  • Weekly segmentation

Medication Adherence Support

Structured reminders and prescription parsing ensure better compliance and reduced missed-dose risk.

  • Time-based alerts
  • Duplicate prevention logic
  • Secure storage

Enterprise-Grade Security

Your medical data remains secure and private.

Token-Based Authentication

JWT-secured sessions with protected API endpoints.

Secure File Storage

Protected upload directories with user-level isolation.

Database Isolation

User-specific data segmentation for maximum confidentiality.

Privacy First

No selling or sharing of personal health information.

Simple Transparent Pricing

Free

₹0

  • Blood pressure tracking
  • Prescription uploads
  • Basic reminders

Pro

₹299 / month

  • Advanced analytics
  • AI wellness plans
  • Priority support

What Users Say

“Tracking my BP weekly helped me notice trends and consult my doctor early.”

— Priya M., Pune

“Medication reminders improved my adherence significantly.”

— Rahul K., Mumbai

Frequently Asked Questions

Is this a medical diagnostic tool?

No. It supports monitoring and does not replace medical professionals.

Is my data safe?

Yes. All endpoints are protected with secure authentication mechanisms.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes. There are no long-term contracts.

Take Control of Your Health Today

Structured monitoring. Intelligent insights. Secure health management.

Health Adviser

Digital health monitoring made simple.
